name: FPB Banking Suite
summary: Secure mobile banking experience focused on transaction safety, regulatory workflows, and reliable offline-friendly states.
challenges: Hardened authentication flows and sensitive data handling
Complex state management across multi-step financial journeys
outcomes: Improved session stability for high-frequency users
Reduced crash rate through safer state transitions

name: SMEDB Banking Suite
summary: SME-focused banking tools with secure onboarding and transparent transaction histories.
outcomes: Delivered consistent transaction UX across devices

name: Plus Financial Platform

outcomes: Streamlined platform delivery for end-users and admins

name: Plus Admin Portal
summary: Admin workflows for managing benefits, users, and approvals with strong performance and SEO.
challenges: Admin-level data visibility and access control

name: HR Hive
summary: Geofencing-based HR suite to manage attendance and field employee activity.
outcomes: Higher accuracy for field attendance tracking

name: Oil Factory Management
summary: Operations management system for industrial workflows and reporting.

name: Alpha Learn

name: Breeze Ticketing
